meta.description:
Cal.com booking webhook → format → Mattermost #bot. Handles BOOKING_CREATED / RESCHEDULED / CANCELLED / MEETING_ENDED with per-event emoji + verb. Attendee summary is de-emphasized to avoid leaking full attendee lists in busy channels. Register the webhook in Cal.com: Settings → Developer → Webhooks → New; URL = http://<n8n-ip>:5678/webhook/calcom-booking; select the trigger events you care about.

Any stack composing `calcom` + `mattermost` + `n8n` can enable this.
